topic: Theme 3: Communication and the World Around Us
subject: french

items.q: How do you say 'I use my phone every day'?
items.correct: J'utilise mon portable tous les jours
items.misconception: Je utilise mon portable tous le jour
items.random_wrong: J'utilise ma portable tout les jours
items.why: Students mismatch gender/number; 'portable' is masculine and 'tous les jours' is fixed.
Students translate literally; in this topic it means social media used to communicate.

items.q: Give an advantage of technology for communication.
items.correct: On peut rester en contact facilement
items.misconception: On ne parle jamais à personne
items.why: Students give negatives when asked for advantages; technology helps people stay in touch easily.
It's The environment. “The mobile network” is the classic near-miss here; knowing why it's wrong is worth as much as knowing the right answer.
